ticket_aberto_desc: Hello {{user}}, your request has been received! Please wait for the support team.
ticket_aberto_sucesso: {{success}} Your ticket has been opened successfully!
ticket_assumido_dm: Your ticket has been claimed by **{{staff}}**.
ticket_motivo_abertura_desc: This ticket was opened via the option: **{{opcao}}**
ticket_limite_atingido: {{cancel}} You have reached the maximum number of open tickets.
ticket_blacklist: {{block}} You are blacklisted and cannot open tickets.
ticket_ja_aberto: {{cancel}} You already have an open ticket: {{canal}}
ticket_sistema_desativado: {{cancel}} The ticket system is currently disabled.
modal_motivo_exemplo_placeholder: E.g.: Issue resolved, no response, etc.
modal_motivo_abertura_label: Why are you opening this ticket?
modal_motivo_abertura_placeholder: Describe the reason for your request...
painel_desc: Customize your ticket system by clicking the buttons below. Configure categories, channels, buttons and optimize your support.
painel_principal_desc: Use the buttons below to access settings, the database and much more!
painel_secao_configurar:
**Configure Ticket**
Manage the ticket system settings
painel_secao_pix:
**Pix**
Settings related to the payment system
painel_secao_enviar:
**Send Ticket**
Send the configured ticket panel to a specific channel
painel_secao_ia:
**AI Setup**
Let artificial intelligence automatically configure your ticket system quickly and in a personalized way
painel_secao_idioma:
**Language**
Change the bot message language for this server
painel_membro_desc: Choose an action from the menu below:
painel_staff_desc: Select an action below to manage this ticket:
fechamento_aviso:
{{lock}} **Ticket Closing**

You have **45 seconds** to provide the closing reason.
If you don't click the button, the ticket will be closed automatically without a reason.
sem_permissao_painel_membro: {{cancel}} Only the ticket creator can use this panel.
sem_permissao_sair: {{cancel}} Only the ticket creator can leave it.
sem_permissao_assumir: {{cancel}} You don't have permission to claim this ticket.
sem_permissao_fechar: {{cancel}} You don't have permission to close this ticket.
sem_permissao_renomear: {{cancel}} You don't have permission to rename this ticket.
sem_permissao_painel_staff: {{cancel}} You don't have permission to access the Staff Panel.
sem_permissao_acao: {{cancel}} You don't have permission to use this action.
sem_permissao_remover_autor: {{cancel}} You cannot remove the ticket author.
avaliacao_desc: How would you rate the support received in ticket **{{ticket}}**?
inatividade_aviso: {{clock}} <@{user}> Your ticket has been inactive for **{horas}h**. Reply within **{{restante}}h** or it will be automatically closed.
inatividade_fechado: {{lock}} Ticket automatically closed due to inactivity.
erro_generico: {{cancel}} An error occurred. Please try again.
sem_permissao: {{cancel}} You don't have permission to do this.
config_idioma_desc: Select the language for bot messages on this server.
outros_mencionar_secao:
**{{bell}} Mention on Open**
Automatically tags the team.
outros_notificar_secao:
**{{message}} Notify on Claim**
DMs the user when the ticket is claimed.
outros_motivo_secao:
**{{clipboard}} Request Reason**
Asks for a reason when opening the ticket.
outros_fechar_servidor_secao:
**{{cancel}} Close on Server Leave**
Closes ticket when user leaves the server.
outros_fechar_ticket_secao:
**{{block}} Close on Ticket Leave**
Closes when author removes their permissions.
outros_motivo_fechar_secao:
**{{clipboard}} Optional Close Reason**
Sends an ephemeral button (45s) instead of opening a modal directly.
outros_tags_secao:
**{{thread}} Ticket Tags**
Custom labels to categorize tickets.
outros_overview_secao:
**{{chart}} Overview Panel**
Real-time embed with open tickets by category.
outros_avaliacao_secao:
**{{star}} Criteria Rating**
Speed, quality and friendliness + staff ranking.
outros_inatividade_secao:
**{{clock}} Auto Inactivity**
Warns and closes tickets with no response for X hours.
idioma_alterado_msg_desc:
{{check}} Language changed to **{{idioma}}**.
Bot messages will now be in this language.
eq_desc: Manage which roles and users can handle or configure tickets.
eq_gerenciar_cargos_desc: Select the roles that can handle tickets. Remove a role by deselecting it.
eq_label_usuario_desc: The user will receive custom permissions
eq_label_atencao_desc: All roles and permissions will be removed
eq_confirmacao_incorreta: {{cancel}} Incorrect confirmation. No permissions were changed.
eq_permissoes_resetadas_desc: All roles and user permissions have been removed.

Choose the channel where the panel will be sent:

visual_personalizar_desc: Select below which embed you want to customize.
visual_embed_principal_desc: Customize the embed used in the ticket panel.
visual_embed_ticket_desc: Customize the embed used inside the ticket.
visual_embed_logs_desc: Customize the embed used in closing logs.
visual_embed_logsuser_desc: Customize the embed sent to the ticket author.
visual_embed_notificar_desc: Customize the embed sent when a call is made.
visual_embed_avaliacao_desc: Customize the rating embed sent to the user.
visual_embed_assumido_desc: Customize the embed sent when a ticket is claimed.
visual_err_emoji_invalido: {{cancel}} Invalid emoji. Use a valid standard or custom emoji.
visual_err_cor_invalida_digitar: {{cancel}} Invalid color. Use only: red, blue, gray or green.
visual_err_cor_hex: {{cancel}} Invalid color. Use hexadecimal format (e.g.: #2ecc71) or leave empty for no color.
visual_err_embed_nao_encontrada: {{cancel}} Unable to find data for this embed.
visual_err_nenhum_dado: {{cancel}} No customization data found. Configure the system first.
visual_err_precisa_config: {{cancel}} You need to configure at least one button or select before sending the panel.
visual_err_atualizar_painel: Error updating the panel. The message may have been deleted.
visual_err_nenhum_painel: No panel has been sent yet. Use /ticket to send the panel first.
visual_err_limite_invalido: {{cancel}} Invalid value! Enter an integer greater than or equal to 1.
logs_secao_fechamento:
**{{lock}} Close Log**
Logs to the configured channel when a ticket is closed.
logs_secao_usuario:
**{{user}} User Log**
Logs when users join or leave the ticket.
logs_secao_canal:
**{{logs}} Log Channel**
Channel where close logs will be sent.
logs_modal_limite_placeholder: Enter an integer greater than or equal to 1
logs_transcript_desc: Control transcript delivery when closing tickets.
logs_transcript_secao_sistema:
**{{yaml}} System**
Disables transcript for staff and user at the same time.
logs_transcript_secao_staff:
**{{file}} Staff**
Disables transcript delivery to the close channel only.
logs_transcript_secao_usuario:
**{{user}} User**
Disables transcript delivery via private message to the ticket author.
logs_transcript_nota: -# This setting only disables the buttons, not message generation itself.
logs_avaliacao_desc: Configure when and where ticket reviews will be recorded.
logs_avaliacao_secao_sistema:
**Review System**
Enables or disables sending reviews when closing tickets.
logs_avaliacao_secao_canal:
**{{logs}} Log Channel**
Channel where received reviews will be recorded.

painel_default_descricao: Open your ticket using the panel below.
visual_ph_user: `{user}` → mentions the user = Use in embedlogs, logsuser, embednotificar, embedavaliacao and embedlogavaliacao
visual_ph_staff: `{staff}` → mentions the staff = Use in embedticket, embedlogs, logsuser, embednotificar and embedassumido
visual_ph_canal: `{canal}` → mentions the channel = Use in embedlogs, logsuser and embednotificar
visual_ph_motivo: `{motivo}` → ticket opening reason = Use in embedticket, embedlogs and logsuser
visual_ph_categoria: `{categoria}` → selected option = Use in embedticket (shows which button/select was used to open)
visual_ph_abertura: `{abertura}` → opening time = Use in embedlogs and logsuser
visual_ph_fechamento: `{fechamento}` → closing time = Use in embedlogs and logsuser
visual_ph_horatotal: `{horatotal}` → total hours open = Use in embedlogs and logsuser
visual_ph_estrelas: `{estrelas}` → stars as emoji (⭐⭐⭐) = Use in embedavaliacao and embedlogavaliacao
visual_ph_avaliacao: `{avaliacao}` → numeric rating (1/5, 2/5...) = Use in embedavaliacao and embedlogavaliacao
visual_ph_comentario: `{comentario}` → review comment = Use in embedavaliacao and embedlogavaliacao
